notes: PiezoInputSCM pitch detection overhaul: detection-branch band-pass filter (2-pole HPF+LPF derived from user range), YIN confidence gating + median-of-5 smoothing, centre-biased octave correction, auto-derived pitch_window. /48 pitch CV encoding for compatibility with Oscillator note input. ADSR auto-banked with fader display in ms. LFO wave dropdown. PiezoInputSCM tuner UI (reference sine tone) for calibrating pitch centre by ear. DC-block always-on (removed user toggle). pitch_detect auto-derived from wiring.
